import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/pages/Game.jsx");import __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=86705d17"; const jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/app/src/pages/Game.jsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import __vite__cjsImport3_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=86705d17"; const React = __vite__cjsImport3_react.__esModule ? __vite__cjsImport3_react.default : __vite__cjsImport3_react; const useState = __vite__cjsImport3_react["useState"]; const useCallback = __vite__cjsImport3_react["useCallback"]; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport3_react["useRef"];
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/framer-motion.js?v=86705d17";
import RunnerMenu from "/src/components/game/RunnerMenu.jsx?t=1777854897074";
import RunnerMapSelect from "/src/components/game/RunnerMapSelect.jsx?t=1777854897075";
import RunnerCanvas from "/src/components/game/RunnerCanvas.jsx?t=1777854343467";
import RunnerHUD from "/src/components/game/RunnerHUD.jsx?t=1777854896975";
import RunnerGameOver from "/src/components/game/RunnerGameOver.jsx?t=1777854896973";
import RunnerPause from "/src/components/game/RunnerPause.jsx?t=1777854896975";
import CopyCodeButton from "/src/components/game/CopyCodeButton.jsx?t=1777854896975";
export default function Game() {
  _s();
  const [screen, setScreen] = useState("menu");
  const [selectedMap, setSelectedMap] = useState(0);
  const [score, setScore] = useState(0);
  const [distance, setDistance] = useState(0);
  const [highScore, setHighScore] = useState(() => {
    const s = localStorage.getItem("runner_highScore");
    return s ? parseInt(s) : 0;
  });
  const [bestDistance, setBestDistance] = useState(() => {
    const s = localStorage.getItem("runner_bestDist");
    return s ? parseInt(s) : 0;
  });
  const [isNewRecord, setIsNewRecord] = useState(false);
  const [isNewDistance, setIsNewDistance] = useState(false);
  const scoreRef = useRef(0);
  const distanceRef = useRef(0);
  const handlePlay = () => setScreen("mapSelect");
  const handleMapSelect = (mapId) => {
    setSelectedMap(mapId);
    setScore(0);
    setDistance(0);
    setIsNewRecord(false);
    setIsNewDistance(false);
    scoreRef.current = 0;
    distanceRef.current = 0;
    setScreen("playing");
  };
  const handleScore = useCallback((s) => {
    scoreRef.current = s;
    setScore(s);
  }, []);
  const handleDistance = useCallback((d) => {
    distanceRef.current = d;
    setDistance(d);
  }, []);
  const handleGameOver = useCallback((finalScore, finalDist) => {
    const newRec = finalScore > highScore;
    const newDist = finalDist > bestDistance;
    if (newRec) {
      setHighScore(finalScore);
      localStorage.setItem("runner_highScore", finalScore.toString());
      setIsNewRecord(true);
    }
    if (newDist) {
      setBestDistance(finalDist);
      localStorage.setItem("runner_bestDist", finalDist.toString());
      setIsNewDistance(true);
    }
    setScore(finalScore);
    setDistance(finalDist);
    setScreen("gameOver");
  }, [highScore, bestDistance]);
  const handlePause = () => setScreen("paused");
  const handleResume = () => setScreen("playing");
  const handleRestart = () => {
    setScore(0);
    setDistance(0);
    setIsNewRecord(false);
    setIsNewDistance(false);
    scoreRef.current = 0;
    distanceRef.current = 0;
    setScreen("playing");
  };
  const handleMenu = () => {
    setScreen("menu");
    setScore(0);
    setDistance(0);
  };
  const isGameActive = screen === "playing" || screen === "paused";
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { "data-source-location": "pages/Game:94:4", "data-dynamic-content": "true", className: "min-h-screen bg-background flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden", children: [

      fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
      lineNumber: 114,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(AnimatePresence, { "data-source-location": "pages/Game:96:6", "data-dynamic-content": "true", mode: "wait", children: [
      screen === "menu" && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        motion.div,
        {
          "data-source-location": "pages/Game:99:10",
          "data-dynamic-content": "true",

                onGameOver: handleGameOver,

            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(

                lineNumber: 162,
                columnNumber: 13
              },
              this
            ),
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(AnimatePresence, { "data-source-location": "pages/Game:149:12", "data-dynamic-content": "true", children: screen === "paused" && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(RunnerPause, { "data-source-location": "pages/Game:151:16", "data-dynamic-content": "true", onResume: handleResume, onQuit: handleMenu }, void 0, false, {

              lineNumber: 170,

              lineNumber: 168,

            }, this)
          ]
        },
        "game",

        {
          fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
          lineNumber: 144,
          columnNumber: 9
        },

      ),
      screen === "gameOver" && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        motion.div,
        {
          "data-source-location": "pages/Game:159:10",
          "data-dynamic-content": "true",
          initial: { opacity: 0 },
          animate: { opacity: 1 },
          exit: { opacity: 0 },
          className: "w-full max-w-md",
          children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
            RunnerGameOver,
            {
              "data-source-location": "pages/Game:166:12",
              "data-dynamic-content": "true",
              score,
              distance,
              isNewRecord,
              isNewDistance,
              onRestart: handleRestart,
              onMenu: handleMenu
            },
            void 0,
            false,
            {
              fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
              lineNumber: 185,
              columnNumber: 13
            },
            this
          )
        },
        "gameOver",
        false,
        {
          fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
          lineNumber: 178,
          columnNumber: 9
        },
        this
      )
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
      lineNumber: 115,
      columnNumber: 7
    }, this)
  ] }, void 0, true, {
    fileName: "/app/src/pages/Game.jsx",
    lineNumber: 113,

  }, this);
}
_s(Game, "syfCdnGCPMKMWgD+sBKtXcUxpOM=");
_c = Game;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "Game");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/app/src/pages/Game.jsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/app/src/pages/Game.jsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
